svg.title: Teensy 4.0 pinout, top view, showing only the pins used by the robot
svg.desc: Two rows of pins on a Teensy 4.0 board. I2C on 18/19, encoders on 14/15/11/12, motor LEFT on 1/20/21, motor RIGHT on 5/6/8, debug LED on 13, USB for micro-ROS serial. All I/O is 3.3V, not 5V tolerant.
svg.text: All I/O is 3.3 V — NOT 5 V tolerant.
Never wire 5 V encoder / sensor lines to any pin.
Pin 21 is NOT PWM-capable on Teensy 4.x —
that is why Motor LEFT PWM is on pin 1.
